name: crewboard
description: CrewBoard - 团队资源排程管理系统

scripts.build: npx terser public/js/i18n.js -c -m -o public/js/dist/i18n.min.js && npx terser public/js/core.js -c -m -o public/js/dist/core.min.js && npx terser public/js/schedule.js -c -m -o public/js/dist/schedule.min.js && npx terser public/js/timesheets.js -c -m -o public/js/dist/timesheets.min.js && npx terser public/js/reports.js -c -m -o public/js/dist/reports.min.js && npx terser public/js/manage.js -c -m -o public/js/dist/manage.min.js && npx terser public/js/enterprise.js -c -m -o public/js/dist/enterprise.min.js
